Container.Name: Portalrr
Container.Overview: Self-hosted invite management portal for Plex and Jellyfin. Create invite links, manage users, and customize every detail of the experience. Features 30+ theme options, block-based onboarding editor, Discord/Telegram bots, webhooks, email templates, multi-admin with 2FA, and more.
Container.Description: Self-hosted invite management portal for Plex and Jellyfin. A modern alternative to Wizarr and JFA-GO with 30+ theme options and full branding control.

Config.Name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
Config.Description: 64-char hex key for encrypting secrets. Generate with: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))"

Config.Name: INSECURE_COOKIES
Config.Description: Set to true if accessing over HTTP (no reverse proxy with HTTPS). Required for most Unraid setups.
